---
title: "About Me"
---

I am a graduate student in Ecosystem Science & Sustainability at Colorado State University with a focus on carbon management, environmental assessment, and environmental data science.

My academic background combines environmental economics, sustainability assessment, and quantitative analysis. Before joining Colorado State University, I studied economics and environmental-economic systems in China, where I became interested in the relationship between environmental sustainability, energy systems, and climate policy.

My current research interests include life cycle assessment (LCA), greenhouse gas inventories, carbon accounting, environmental-economic modeling, and sustainability analysis. I am particularly interested in applying quantitative and data-driven approaches to support low-carbon decision-making in agriculture and energy systems.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Research Philosophy

I am interested in interdisciplinary approaches that integrate environmental science, economics, and data analysis to better understand sustainability challenges and climate mitigation pathways.

I believe combining quantitative modeling, environmental assessment, and policy analysis can help support more practical and evidence-based sustainability decisions.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Academic Interests

- Carbon Management
- Life Cycle Assessment (LCA)
- Greenhouse Gas Inventories
- Environmental Data Science
- Environmental Economics
- ESG & Sustainability
- Agricultural Sustainability

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current Focus

My recent work includes:

- LCA-LCC assessment of Synthetic Humic Substance (SHS) production
- Greenhouse gas inventory analysis using IPCC methods
- Environmental-economic modeling and sustainability analysis
- Renewable energy and climate policy research

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Professional Interests

I am interested in future opportunities related to:

- Sustainability research
- Carbon accounting and mitigation
- ESG analysis
- Environmental consulting
- Climate and energy policy
- Environmental data analytics
